channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Who are Andy Burnham’s key aides and allies?
item.description: Who are Andy Burnham’s key aides and allies?

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting - The Guardian
Independent UK Politics: Inside the Brexit-voting Labour stronghold that looks set to determine our next prime minister

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Reeves begins push to remain as chancellor under new Labour leadership

item.title: The Guardian: Reeves makes case to remain as chancellor with reports Burnham may favour Miliband - The Guardian
item.description: Reeves makes case to remain as chancellor with reports Burnham may favour Miliband - The Guardian

item.title:
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: Andy Burnham says land in the UK is ‘undertaxed’ - giftarticle.ft.com/giftarticle/...
There wasn't any kind of battle of idea in GE2024 and now we're getting one. I know people are irritated at all the turmoil but t...

item.title: i Politics: Starmer has privately conceded he may not fight a leadership challenge

item.title: Sky News Politics: UK faces 'economic catastrophe' unless it adapts to young people 'rewired by smartphones'
